sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'R', 'N']:
        b = n['boundary']
        minr = min(r for r,c in b)
        maxr = max(r for r,c in b)
        minc = min(c for r,c in b)
        maxc = max(c for r,c in b)
        print(f"id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} bbox=({minr},{maxr},{minc},{maxc})")

# Check ASCII
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Green rect area ===")
for i in range(30, 50):
    print(f"Row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][36:50]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
